    G

    GAME - Enum constant in enum class util.BGMManager.TrackName
    Game track.
    GameInstance - Class in logic
    Control most of the game's main logic.
    GameInstance() - Constructor for class logic.GameInstance
    Constructor for GameInstance.
    GameScene - Class in gui
    The main game's UI.
    GameScene() - Constructor for class gui.GameScene
    Constructs the game scene.
    gameTime - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Current game time.
    Equals to second passed in real life since the game started times TICK_RATE.

    Generates the detailed description for the menu.

    Generates the detailed description for the menu.

    Generates the detailed description for the menu.

    Calculates points for having the correct ingredient in the sandwich.

    Calculates points for the ingredient matching the correct layer position.

    Get server counter from serving room

    Gets the current stage from a JavaFX event.

    Gets the current stage from a JavaFX node.

    Gets the singleton instance of the settings menu UI.

    Getter for the width of the container.
    getWidth() - Method in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    Gets the width.
    goToGameScene() - Method in class gui.TutorialScene
    Transitions from the tutorial to the game scene.
    grill() - Method in interface entity.Grillable
    Increase the grilled percentage of Grillable ingredient.
    grill() - Method in class entity.ingredients.Bacon
    Increase the grilled percentage of Grillable ingredient.
    grill() - Method in class entity.ingredients.Egg
    Increase the grilled percentage of Grillable ingredient.
    Grillable - Interface in entity
    Interface for grillable ingredient which can be interacted with using Stove
    grilledPercentage - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Bacon
    The percentage to which the bacon has been grilled.
    grilledPercentage - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Egg
    The percentage to which the egg has been grilled.
    grilledPercentageIncrement - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Bacon
    The increment value for the grilled percentage per tick.
    grilledPercentageIncrement - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Egg
    The increment value for the grilled percentage per tick.
    gui - package gui
    Contains the main user interface components, including the main menu, settings, and the primary game scene.
    gui.components - package gui.components
    Contains reusable graphical user interface components used across various scenes.
    gui.room - package gui.room
    Contains the specific UI room layouts and logics where the player can navigate and interact with counters.
